about.metaDescription: Learn about COWIN MAGNET, a service-first magnetic separation equipment supplier helping overseas buyers with selection, sourcing coordination, OEM/ODM communication, and delivery follow-up.
about.h1: A service-first magnetic separation equipment supplier
about.heroAlt: COWIN MAGNET service support for global buyers
about.profileText1: COWIN MAGNET focuses on magnetic separation equipment and industrial magnetic products for global B2B buyers. Our role is to understand the application, clarify working conditions, and help buyers match suitable equipment and supply resources.
about.profileText2: Our core principle is service first: clear communication, practical selection advice, honest capability statements, and reliable follow-up before and after shipment.
about.expertText: David helps buyers clarify requirements before choosing equipment: material type, belt width, belt speed, material layer, installation height, cleaning method, and target iron removal result. The goal is not to push a model quickly, but to make the buyer’s decision safer and more practical.
about.description: COWIN MAGNET is not positioned as a factory. We help overseas buyers choose suitable magnetic separation equipment, coordinate reliable supply, and make the purchasing process clearer from inquiry to delivery.
about.serviceTitle: More than products: selection, sourcing, and follow-up service
about.serviceText: For overseas buyers, the right supplier should reduce communication cost and help avoid unsuitable equipment choices.
services: Product selection based on conveyor and material conditions
OEM/ODM requirement communication with suitable production partners
Quote preparation with clear product scope and technical details
Pre-shipment photo, video, packaging, and document follow-up
After-sales communication for installation questions and spare parts
Long-term sourcing support for magnetic separation equipment categories

contact.metaDescription: Contact COWIN MAGNET for magnetic separator selection, product inquiries, OEM/ODM customization, and global B2B quotation support.
contact.description: Share your product requirement, country, material, conveyor conditions, and contact details. Our sales team will contact you soon.
contact.fastTip: For faster selection, include belt width, material, belt speed, suspension height, and iron contamination level.
